video.title: Giro d'Italia Stage 14 Highlights - 27% Gradients On The Monte Zoncolan!

transcript.clean_text: it's the mountain that loomed large for the peloton on stage 14 of the giron italia another long day in the saddle 205 k's in total from the start in chittodela and with the first half of the stage flat it could prove difficult for the climber to get into the early break the climbing would begin in earnest after 135 k's with the second category for chella monterest but this day was all about the final one the so-called easier side of the zonkel but still 14 k's long eight and a half percent with ramps of over 20 in the final 3k to the line we did get some climbers in the early break and two of them stood out from the others balcomolomer of trek segafredo and the new zealand national champion george bennett of jumbo visma both of them had teammates and yolo kameta also had two riders up the road with albanese and fortunato behind them it was astana and not ineos grenadiers who were controlling looking to set up alexander vlassoff for the stage win but with the leaders advantage almost seven minutes as molimer took first place over that penultimate climb they were going to have their work cut out they made a good fist of it though particularly on the ensuing descent which they ripped down so fast in fact there were some major splits behind them again burnout was there attentive as ever but the other gc contenders had all been distanced they would eventually make it back but how much energy had that cost them up front it was yan tratnik of bahrain victorious who made the first big move and he got a decent gap lorenzo fortunato of viola cometa the rider who set off in pursuit with the starter losing men left right and center it was time for ineos to thank them for their work and set to it themselves and as the two riders came together at the front of the race the pace was still high high enough for vincenzo nibley to get dropped a shark on an off day with two kilometers to go the gradient of the road and a pace of fortinato proved too much for trapnic and the italian was riding towards a historical win simon yates was the first big name to try his hand from the group of favourites and whilst burn now stuck with him nobody else could even nepal was suffering and so too with the rest they say that fortune favors the brave and fortunato would upset everybody today the 25 year old surely couldn't have dreamt of such a big win in his first grand tour but that's exactly what he's got burnout was flying again though too strong for everybody else even for simon yates and the pink jersey would tighten his grip on it sprinting out of the saddle all the way to the finish line he's done everything right at this year's jira at italia and it's going to be a big ask to take that race lead away from him yates would cross the line 11 seconds later a promising ride by him but for vlassof it was a day to forget he'd concede over a minute the day belonged to this man though the tenth rider to take their first ever grand tour stage win in the first 14 stages of this race behind him it was trafnic then kobe the only other rider from the early break to stay clear of burnout monomer sandwiched between him and yates bennett and oliveira are having to settle for seventh and eighth solid riding from caruso martinez saw them in ninth and tenth with judo ciaconi on the same time bookman and mccarthy just behind that well there have been significant changes on the gc albeit not at the very top of it again now strengthens his grip on the pink jersey with another dominant display simon yates is now behind him at just over a minute and a half caruso remains in third blassoff down to fourth carthy down to fifth then it's bookman and chicony now in eighth is ever nepal martinez and barde both move up a place with foss slipping just outside the top ten it's a slightly easier and much shorter day for everybody tomorrow 147 kilometers most of that on a circuit which is in both italy and slovenia there's a fourth category climb on the lap which they'll tackle three times 1.7 k's at 8 and then an undulating final 17 kilometers to the finish line in gorica potentially it's another big opportunity for a breakaway success make sure you join us tomorrow on gcn plus for our live coverage if you can territory restrictions apply see you then you
